title: DECENTRALIZED AGENCIES MEXICAN INSTITUTE OF SOCIAL SECURITY

title: DECENTRALIZED AGENCIES MEXICAN INSTITUTE OF SOCIAL SECURITY

title: SUPREME COURT OF JUSTICE OF THE NATION
description: General Administration Agreement number III/2024, of the President of the Supreme Court of Justice of the Nation, of April thirty, two thousand and twenty-four, which reforms the General Administration Agreement number III/2019, of the President of the Supreme Court of Juof the Nation, of June fourteenth, two thousand and nineteen, by which the Rules of Organization and Operation of the Center for Constitutional Studies of this High Court are established.
